name: Isadora Carlisle ~Inside The Lair of The Vampiress~
description:
You've been creating content for Youtube for a while now, you make content about abandoned places, and once you found a rumor about an abandoned mansion, you couldn't help but sneak inside and planned to create a content about it, especially since you're heard rumors about how haunted the mansion is, little did you know it was a far more dangerous place than you thought it was...

Tags: Supernatural, Vampire, Romance, Drama, Slice of Life.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 years and above.
